titleStmt.title: SII 15.151: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 151. (B.K. No. 1 of 1930-31.) BHAIRAVĀḌIGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On four pieces of a broken slab built in the wall of the Basavēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1114, Virōdhikṛit Pushya, śu. 8, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1191 A.D., December 25. The Śaka year was current.

It records a gift of land for maintaining a charitable feeding house for Brāhmaṇas made in the presence of the Mahājanas of the agrahāra Ēḷāpura, by Māḷiya[kka], wife of [Mā]charasa, the nephew of Kallarasa, the Prabhu of the western quarters of Bauddhavāḍige. The gift land is said to have been purchased by the lady from the money received as present at the time of her marriage.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥstuṁgaśiraḥścuṁbi caṁdracāmara
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē © svasti bhyudayaścaḥ © © ©
svasti śrīmatu ḷa pratāpacakravartti bhi
llamadēva rājya Uttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire sakavarśada 1114 ne
ya virōdhikritu saṁvatsarada puṣya su 8 budhavāradaṁdu
vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramāṇadalu brāhmaṇargge bhōjanada satranimi
ttavāgi śrīmaduttamadagrahāra Ēḷāpuradaśēṣamahā
janaṁgaḷu pramukhavāgiralu tamma bauddhavāḍigeya paḍuvagē
riya prabhu kallarasanaḷiya mācarasana maduvaḷige māḷiya
kkaṁ taṁna baḷivaḷigeyiṁ korggaṭanūravariṁ mūḍalu dēvāpurada ku
keyiṁ teṁkalu naṁnarasana keyiṁ paḍuvalu nāmarasana ke
taṁna bhāgada beṁkoḷvana kōlu mattaru
kayyalu 16 hoṁge votte

mattaru . mumaṁ sātiyahaḷḷiya
ga rāyaṇane kayyalu votteviḍida maneya gadyāṇa 3
dyāṇa 16 yeraḍuṁ hāḍada keyya baḷiyalli sū
tānuṁ harccukoṁḍa maneya hoṁnumaṁ yiṁntinitu
kavāgi taṁna purśaṁgaṁ tanagaṁ vakṣavāge biṭṭaḻu
nnevaraṁ tāne brāhmaṇarggeyaḍikki kritārtteyappa
ḍuvagēriya prabhugaḷu tāve taṁma dhammavāgi prati
yācarasana vrittiyanotteyiṭṭukoṁḍa magaṁ rāmayyanu taṁmma
yayyaṁge parōkṣavinayavāgi yācarasanūtteviḍidirddakeyi biṭṭa
hoṁge mattaṁ keyyanotteviḍidu koṭṭu dharmmamaṁ naḍasuvanu yiṁntīdha
nāru pratipāḻisidavargge gaṁge kurukṣētra vāraṇāsiyoḷu sā
kavileymaṁ sāsira hoṁnumaṁ sāsira vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇa
phalaṁ yī dharmma manāraḻidaḍaṁ yiṁntinitanaḻidavōl maṁgaḻamaThe letter ma is written above the line and the ma sign is engraved below dha.

srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . ©
